hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(--force|--force-with-lease|-f\b)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\b(main|master)\b'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force-pushing to main or master is blocked by project policy"}}\n'; fi; }
